project.nameDescription: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. e.g: my-client-project

launch.label: Launch
launch.description: $400 — 1 route, 5 blocks, 1 language, no dark mode

growth.label: Growth
growth.description: $800 — 5 routes, 25 blocks, 2 languages, dark mode, blog

languages.defaultLocaleDescription: The locale shown when no language prefix is in the URL

theme.darkModeDescription: Allow users to toggle between light and dark mode

menus.singlePageDescription: Site has only one route — no multi-page navigation needed

mega.label: Mega menu navigation
mega.description: Supports dropdown menus and nested links — Scale only

mega.label: Mega footer
mega.description: Full footer with link groups and brand section — Scale only

collections.postsDescription: Enable the Posts collection for blog support
collections.teamDescription: Enable the Our Team collection to showcase team members

brevo.label: Brevo
brevo.description: Connect form submissions to a Brevo list

hubspot.label: HubSpot
hubspot.description: Connect form submissions to a HubSpot form

crm.brevoListIdDescription: The ID of the Brevo list where contacts will be added

project.nameDescription: Solo letras minúsculas, números y guiones. ej: mi-proyecto-cliente

theme.darkModeDescription: Permite a los usuarios alternar entre modo claro y oscuro

menus.singlePageDescription: El sitio tiene solo una ruta — no se necesita navegación multi-página

mega.label: Mega menú
